name: core.openwop.agents.frontend-designer
description: Frontend / UI design agent. Produces design-system-aware component specs, page layouts, and Storybook-style mocks from briefs. Mirrors Anthropic's `frontend-design` skill (top-installed in marketplace).
author: OpenWOP Working Group

agents.label: Frontend Designer Agent
agents.description: Produces design-system-aware component specs, page layouts, and mocks. Reads a brief + optional design-system source files; emits component contracts (props + variants + states), layout JSON, and React/HTML skeleton code. Mirrors Anthropic's `frontend-design` skill.
